title: Cibb@kay #5444
definition:
Sibbecai or Sibbechai = "weaver"

 1) one of David's guard and 8th captain for the 8th month of 24,000
    men of the king's army; a Judaite, descendant of Zerah and called
    the 'Hushathite'
